name: I'm a cowboy: Western Shooter
short_description: I'm a cowboy: Western Shooter is a dynamic Top-Down Shooter with roguelike elements. Grab your revolver, spur your horse and prove to all the thugs that you are the best shooter in the entire Wild West!
detailed_description:
Billy the Kid, now Mister World 1895, used to be your friend, but that all changed after you left the gang. And on one of the ill-fated days of 1898, Kid and his friends broke into your house to get even for old grievances.



In vain your wife opened the door, now she is dead, and you have nothing left that could keep you from returning to the path of pain and murder.

Grab your revolver, spur your horse and prove to all the thugs that you are the best shooter in the entire Wild West!

You are waiting for exciting adventures, dynamic skirmishes, duels and the opportunity to improve the characteristics of the hero.

- 10 unique levels;
- Horse riding;
- Colorful shooting;
- Duels;
- Improving the characteristics of the character;
- Dramatic story.

The game also has a zombie mode.
